title: alerts-ack output data
description: Shape of the ``data`` field on an ``alerts-ack`` envelope.

acknowledged_up_to.description: The ISO-8601 UTC instant the acknowledgment watermark was advanced to.
acknowledged_up_to.title: Acknowledged Up To

acknowledged_count.description: How many previously-unacknowledged alerts this call cleared from the standing queue (before minus after).
acknowledged_count.title: Acknowledged Count

remaining.description: Unacknowledged alerts still newer than the watermark after this call (non-zero only if new alerts carry a ts past up_to_ts).
remaining.title: Remaining
